\tzpentry{ID5839}{Gyromagnetic Quantum State Parametrization}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5839 introduces Gyromagnetic Quantum State Parametrization as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi[t] = \begin{pmatrix} \mathbf{r}_{cm}(t) \in \mathbb{R}^3 \\ \boldsymbol{\omega}_{gyro}(t) \in \mathfrak{so}(3) \\ \boldsymbol{\mu}_{constrained}(t) \in \mathbb{R}^3 \\ \mathbf{L}_{mech}(t) \in \mathbb{R}^3 \end{pmatrix} \end{equation}
